articles.title: BNB Weekly Trenches Report — 20.04 to 26.04.2026
articles.body:
ETH and SOL memes ate the spotlight this week. Elon's Asteroid interaction pushed an ETH meta hard, while Burnie kept the Solana side ripping. BNB watchers had a quieter week — but if alpha and spot listings on Binance pick up next week, expect liquidity to bridge back fast.

1. Flap coins dominating Meme Rank

Only 3 of the top 10 coins on Binance Wallet's Meme Rank are Four.meme tokens this week — Flap is eating the chart. The competition for attention has never been thicker.

Worth keeping an eye on the OGs still waiting for their Binance spot/alpha call: Freedom of Money, Bibi, Palu, Pup, and others. The bench is deep — when listings resume, the rotation could be sharp.

2. Virus has been spreading

Virus has been the meme coin of the week. #1 on Binance Wallet's Meme Rank for several weeks running, also the top-performing meme on @flapdotsh. Chart almost touched $20M mcap this week.

3. Trusty keeping the uptrend

$TRUSTY had a busy week. Listed on @GroveXchange. We're in the Four.meme hackathon with results dropping at the end of the month. Got listed on BNB Chain dApps, and submitted an application for Trust Wallet dApps.

Visible uptrend, beautiful daily chart. The community is building, the integrations are stacking.

4. Bibi posted by Binance officials

Bibi made it to Binance China's Instagram stories, and Binance Africa posted Bibi today. The mascot is being brought to live events — attendees can win keychains and Bibi plushies as prizes.

This is the kind of distribution most meme coins never get. IRL marketing → physical merch → genuine community attachment is exactly the playbook OG memes followed in 2021.

The Take

Three things to watch next week:

1. ETH/SOL liquidity bridging back to BNB if Binance alpha/spot listings resume.

2. The OG Four.meme bench (Freedom of Money, Bibi, Palu, Pup) holding ground while waiting for their call.

3. Whether Bibi's IRL marketing converts into more Meme Rank momentum.

BNB had a quieter week on the surface, but a lot is being built under the hood. The next listing wave will reveal who actually shows up.

📣 Original thread on X: @Trusty_BSC — weekly report
articles.takeaway: BNB looked quiet this week but the OG Four.meme bench is deep. Bibi's IRL marketing and Trusty's listing run are the early signals — when alpha/spot listings come back, the rotation will be fast.

articles.title: BNB Weekly Trenches Report — 13.04 to 19.04.2026
articles.body:
A wild week on BNB Chain. A stealth launch with CZ attached, a sleeper Chinese gem that 12x'd while no one was watching, and two OG memes kicking off what might be a real season.

1. GENIUS — The week opened loud

@GeniusTerminal dropped their token on April 13. The team is backed by @yzilabs and has @cz_binance listed as an advisor. It instantly got the eyes of the biggest traders in the game — @RuneCrypto_ and @MarcellxMarcell both blasted it with size.

It went from $0.20 to $1 per token with no spot T1 listings and no hard CZ shilling. Pure narrative plus trader positioning.

2. 币安人生 / Binance Life — April's sleeper

The biggest sleeper gem of the whole month. Bottomed at $37M at the end of March and sits at $470M at time of writing — roughly a 12x while most people were busy watching GENIUS.

This one is pure Chinese community on BNB. If you're not in the CN groups, you missed the early entry — that's the edge.

3. OG Memes — PALU and PUP kick off the mini-season

Both PALU and PUP had an insane week, and together they may have started the mini BNB meme season we've been waiting for.

PALU got a signal from Binance — included in a main account post that was RT'd by Yi He. Both tokens are listed on Binance Alpha, which means the biggest CEX in the world already holds the supply. Traders are speculating that if sentiment stays bullish, spot listings could follow.

The Take

Three different setups, one pattern: early access to the right community wins. GENIUS was a pre-launch narrative play, Binance Life was a Chinese-groups-only entry, PALU and PUP were Binance Alpha watchers.

If you're only in English-speaking alpha groups, you're seeing 1/3 of the chain. The Trenches Report exists to surface the other two-thirds.

📣 Original thread on X: @Trusty_BSC — weekly report
articles.takeaway: BNB mini-season might be starting. Watch Binance Alpha listings and Chinese community plays — that's where the early entries are hiding.

articles.title: Week in Meme is Here 📰
articles.body:
This is where Trusty recaps what's happening across the chains — the pumps, the rugs, the narratives, and the takes that actually matter.

Every week we'll break down the biggest moves, who called them, who got rugged, and what you can learn from it. No shilling. No financial advice. Just the meta, explained.

If you spot something worth covering — a viral token, a clean rug, a wild CZ post — DM @Trusty_BSC and we'll feature it.
articles.takeaway: The market moves fast. Read this weekly to stay ahead of the narratives without scrolling X for 6 hours a day.
